value: ccli init scans codebase via scanCodebase() in src/commands/scan.ts — 6 composable detectors (detectProject, detectCommands, detectFiles, detectDeps, detectConventions, detectContext). Generates CLAUDE.md via src/commands/claude-md.ts. Seeds conventions.persistence entry for three-file balance. Flags: --no-scan, --no-claude, --force, --dry-run. Idempotent — skips existing keys.
